root.sql:
SELECT sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.membership_no , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.membership_no ) as membername , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sysdate , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as sysdate_tdatepka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sysdate , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as sysdate_tdate , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.balance_date , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control) as mem_no
FROM sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_ucf_region_group WHERE ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.share_balance > 0 ) AND ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_status_code = '0' ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.region_group = sc_mem_m_ucf_region_group.region_group ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_region_group.region_group_control = '9000' ) /*WHERE*/
